keywords: DFS cycle detection WHITE GRAY BLACK coloring adjacency map type compatibility sourceOutputType targetInputType OCC version lock DRAFT PUBLISHED FlowPublished CycleDetected TypeMismatch
teachingPoint: T618 FlowPublicationOrchestrator enforces a 3-guard publication gate: ORDER 1 = DFS cycle detection using WHITE/GRAY/BLACK coloring (CycleDetected on cycle), ORDER 2 = type compatibility per-edge (TypeMismatch if sourceOutputType !== targetInputType), ORDER 3 = OCC version check (FlowPublicationConflict on expectedVersion mismatch). FlowPublished emitted after DNA-8 audit storeDocument.
ironRules: ORDER 1 DFS cycle detection: WHITE/GRAY/BLACK as const — GRAY means currently being visited; encountering GRAY node during DFS = cycle; emits CycleDetected
DFS must traverse ALL edges in the graph adjacency map — not just direct neighbors; depth-first recursive traversal required
ORDER 2 type compatibility: every edge must have sourceOutputType === targetInputType; first mismatch emits TypeMismatch with edge details
ORDER 3 OCC: expectedVersion from caller must equal currentVersion in stored flow document — version mismatch emits FlowPublicationConflict
storeDocument(PUBLICATION_AUDIT_INDEX) MUST complete before enqueue(FlowPublished) — DNA-8 outbox pattern
